text:
STANDARD OPERATING PROCEDURE
Equipment: Gas Turbine GT-114
Document No: SOP-005
Hazard Level: MEDIUM

1. PURPOSE
This procedure describes the lockout/tagout and inspection steps required before
performing maintenance on the Gas Turbine GT-114.

2. REQUIRED PPE
Technicians must wear the following before beginning work: respirator, chemical gloves, face shield.

3. PROCEDURE
   Step 1: Check lubrication levels and top off per spec sheet.
   Step 2: Check lubrication levels and top off per spec sheet.
   Step 3: Test emergency stop function.
   Step 4: Check lubrication levels and top off per spec sheet.
   Step 5: Verify guard and enclosure are reinstalled before re-energizing.
   Step 6: Torque check all fasteners to manufacturer spec.

4. NOTES
Deviations from this procedure must be logged and approved by the maintenance supervisor.
